scripts.compile:win: npm run bundle && pkg bin/bundle.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/ai-browser-copilot-win-x64.exe
scripts.compile:mac: npm run bundle && pkg bin/bundle.cjs --targets node18-macos-x64 --output bin/ai-browser-copilot-macos-x64
scripts.compile:mac-arm: npm run bundle && pkg bin/bundle.cjs --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output bin/ai-browser-copilot-macos-arm64
scripts.compile:linux: npm run bundle && pkg bin/bundle.cjs --targets node18-linux-x64 --output bin/ai-browser-copilot-linux-x64
scripts.compile:linux-arm: npm run bundle && pkg bin/bundle.cjs --targets node18-linux-arm64 --output bin/ai-browser-copilot-linux-arm64
